name: display-dev
description: Publish HTML or Markdown files behind company authentication, public sharing, or a private link.

interface.shortDescription: Publish files behind company auth or share publicly.
interface.longDescription: display.dev lets Codex publish HTML and Markdown files as shareable URLs behind company authentication (Google Workspace or Microsoft 365 SSO), share publicly, or share with specific email addresses. The Codex plugin bundles the display.dev skill and remote MCP server.
